steps.title: Generate the index for STAR
steps.instruction: Generate the index for STAR. STAR 2.7.9a STAR index STAR --runMode genomeGenerate \ --genomeDir {params.outdir} \ --genomeFastaFiles {input.fasta} \ --sjdbGTFfile {input.gtf} \ --sjdbOverhang {params.overhang} \ --runThreadN {resources.cpus}

steps.title: Align RNA-Seq reads for a sample using STAR
steps.instruction: Align RNA-Seq reads for a sample using STAR. STAR 2.7.9a STAR align STAR --runMode alignReads \ --runThreadN {resources.cpus} \ --genomeDir {params.index_dir} \ --readFilesIn {params.fastq_list} \ --readFilesCommand zcat \ --twopassMode Basic \ --varVCFfile

steps.title: Get an individual-specific VCF file
steps.instruction: Get an individual-specific VCF file. This is used by STAR to consider the individual's variants for better alignment. bcftools 1.12 https://github.com/samtools/bcftools bcftools view bcftools view -s {wildcards.rat_id} --min-ac=1 -O z -o {output} {input}

steps.title: Get all exon regions from gene annotations
steps.instruction: Get all exon regions from gene annotations. Exons from GTF annotations grep -v '^#' {input} | awk '$3=="exon"' | cut -f1,4,5 | gzip -c > {output}

steps.title: Subset genotypes to only exon SNPs,...
steps.instruction: Subset genotypes to only exon SNPs, SNPs with MAF >= 0.2, and SNPs with <10% missing values. bcftools 1.12 https://github.com/samtools/bcftools bcftools view bcftools view {input.vcf} \ --regions-file {input.regions} \ -Ou | bcftools view \ --min-af 0.2:minor \ -i 'F_MISSING samtools 1.12 https://github.com/samtools/samtools tabix tabix -p vcf {output.vcf}

steps.title: Count reads with REF vs
steps.instruction: Count reads with REF vs. ALT allele in a sample for each SNP. gatk ASEReadCounter gatk ASEReadCounter \ -R {input.ref} \ -I {input.bam} \ -V {input.vcf} \ -O {output} \ --min-depth-of-non-filtered-base 10 \ --min-mapping-quality 250 \ --min-base-quality 15

steps.title: Compare similarity of genotypes and allele...
steps.instruction: Compare similarity of genotypes and allele counts from RNA-Seq to identify mixups. qc_rna_to_geno_similarity.py Produces a matrix of RNA-Seq samples x VCF individuals giving similarity across the test SNPs. Similarity is mean(1 - abs(RNA_frac - geno_frac)), where RNA_frac is fraction of reads with ALT allele for each SNP, and geno_frac is fraction of DNA strands with ALT allele (i.e. 0, 0.5, or 1) for each SNP. Also produces a summary table with top similarity per RNA-Seq sample to quickly check for mismatches.

steps.title: For samples without a genotype match,...
steps.instruction: For samples without a genotype match, check for matches in all rats. qc_rna_to_geno_all_rats.py After running the previous step, some mismatched RNA samples might still not have a genotype match. This rule will compare their test SNPs to those of all 6000+ rats we have genotypes for to see if any match. It's good to also include at least one RNA sample ID that did match as a positive control (as long as it's included in the all-rat VCF).

steps.title: Examine the outputs to identify samples...
steps.instruction: Examine the outputs to identify samples that need to be relabeled (e.g. if two labels get swapped) or removed. To relabel a sample, edit the ID in the 2nd column of fastq_map.txt for all of its FASTQ files so that its BAM file gets labeled correctly. You'll then need to regenerate the BAM file since it will now use the correct VCF individual as input to STAR. To remove a sample, remove its ID from rat_ids.txt and delete its BAM and any other generated files. If a match is found with a rat outside the current dataset in the previous step, you'll need to add the new matching genotypes to the VCF file. However, if the matching genotypes differ greatly from the current dataset, e.g. they include a very different set of SNPs, it may be better to just remove the sample.

steps.title: Generate the index for RSEM
steps.instruction: Generate the index for RSEM. RSEM rsem-prepare-reference rsem-prepare-reference \ {input.fasta} \ ref/rsem_reference/rsem_reference \ --gtf {input.gtf} \ --num-threads {resources.cpus}

steps.title: Quantify expression from a BAM file
steps.instruction: Quantify expression from a BAM file. RSEM rsem-calculate-expression rsem-calculate-expression \ {params.paired_end_flag} \ --num-threads {resources.cpus} \ --quiet \ --estimate-rspd \ --no-bam-output \ --alignments {input.bam} \ {params.ref_prefix} \ {params.out_prefix} gzip gzip gzip {params.out_prefix}.genes.results

steps.title: Combine all isoforms of a gene into a single transcript
steps.instruction: Combine all isoforms of a gene into a single transcript. collapse_annotation.py Originally used in the GTEx pipeline . python3 src/collapse_annotation.py \ ref/Rattus_norvegicus.Rnor_6.0.99.gtf \ ref/Rattus_norvegicus.Rnor_6.0.99.genes.gtf

steps.title: Combine RSEM output from all samples...
steps.instruction: Combine RSEM output from all samples into log-count and TPM expression tables. assemble_expression.py Also computes inverse-quantile normalized values to use for eQTL mapping. The filtered version is to avoid a tensorQTL error on phenotypes with 1 nonzero value. python3 src/assemble_expression.py {params.rsem_dir} {input.anno} {params.prefix} samtools 1.12 https://github.com/samtools/samtools bgzip bgzip {params.prefix}.log2.bedbgzip {params.prefix}.tpm.bedbgzip {params.prefix}.iqn.bedbgzip {params.prefix}.iqn.filtered.bed tabix tabix {params.prefix}.log2.bed.gztabix {params.prefix}.tpm.bed.gztabix {params.prefix}.iqn.bed.gztabix {params.prefix}.iqn.filtered.bed.gz

steps.title: Get SNPs with sufficient variation in...
steps.instruction: Get SNPs with sufficient variation in a given set of samples and convert VCF to plink. plink 2 plink2 make bed plink2 --make-bed \ --vcf {input.vcf} \ --keep {input.samples} \ --maf 0.01 \ --mac 2 \ --max-alleles 2 \ --out {params.prefix}

steps.title: Prune genotypes to compute covariate PCs
steps.instruction: Prune genotypes to compute covariate PCs. --indep-pairwise parameters are based on GTEx methods. plink 2 plink2 prune plink2 \ --bfile {params.prefix} \ --geno 0.05 \ --maf 0.05 \ --indep-pairwise 200 100 0.1 \ --out {params.pruned_prefix} plink2 subset to pruned plink2 \ --bfile {params.prefix} \ --extract {params.pruned_prefix}.prune.in \ --export vcf bgz id-paste=iid \ --out {params.pruned_prefix}

steps.title: Compute genotype (n=5) and expression (n=20)...
steps.instruction: Compute genotype (n=5) and expression (n=20) PCs and combine into covariates table. covariates.R Rscript src/covariates.R {input.vcf} {input.bed} {params.n_geno_pcs} {params.n_expr_pcs} {output}

steps.title: Map cis-eQTLs, determining significance using permutations
steps.instruction: Map cis-eQTLs, determining significance using permutations. Outputs the top association per gene. This script calls tensorQTL and uses the random_tiebreak parameter, which is important for outbred populations in which there are often multiple top eSNPs in 100% LD. Without the random tiebreak, the first or last tied top SNP is returned, resulting in positional bias. tensorQTL run_tensorqtl.py python3 src/run_tensorqtl.py \ {params.geno_prefix} \ {input.bed} \ {output} \ --covariates {input.covar} \ --mode cis

steps.title: Use stepwise regression to identify multiple...
steps.instruction: Use stepwise regression to identify multiple conditionally independent cis-eQTLs per gene. tensorQTL python3 src/run_tensorqtl.py \ {params.geno_prefix} \ {input.bed} \ {output} \ --covariates {input.covar} \ --cis_output {input.cis} \ --mode cis_independent

steps.title: Get summary statistics for all tested cis-window SNPs per gene
steps.instruction: Get summary statistics for all tested cis-window SNPs per gene. tensorQTL tensorqtl cis_nominal python3 -m tensorqtl \ {params.geno_prefix} \ {input.bed} \ {wildcards.tissue} \ --covariates {input.covar} \ --output_dir {params.outdir} \ --mode cis_nominal

steps.title: Map trans-eQTLs
steps.instruction: Map trans-eQTLs. tensorQTL tensorqtl trans python3 -m tensorqtl \ {params.geno_prefix} \ {input.bed} \ {wildcards.tissue} \ --covariates {input.covar} \ --output_dir {params.outdir} \ --output_text \ --batch_size 10000 \ --mode trans

steps.title: Extract all significant cis SNP-gene pairs
steps.instruction: Extract all significant cis SNP-gene pairs. tensorqtl_all_signif.py python3 src/tensorqtl_all_signif.py {input.perm} {params.nom_prefix} {output}

steps.title: Extract p-values for all tested cis-window SNPs per gene
steps.instruction: Extract p-values for all tested cis-window SNPs per gene. tensorqtl_all_cis_pvals.py python3 src/tensorqtl_all_cis_pvals.py {params.nom_dir} {output}

steps.title: Get effect size (allelic fold change)...
steps.instruction: Get effect size (allelic fold change) for top association per gene and all significant cis-eQTLs. aFC https://github.com/secastel/aFC prepare_qtl_for_afc.py python3 tools/aFC/aFC.py \ --vcf {input.vcf} \ --pheno {input.bed} \ --qtl
